message:
feat(web): enhance UI components with animations and compatibility

SequenceView.tsx - View mode toggle and dvh fixes:
- Add animated sliding indicator for ViewModeToggle segments
- Track indicator position with refs and update on value/resize
- Use CSS custom properties for indicator positioning
- Add useDvhSupport() hook to detect dvh unit support
- Normalize height prop: replace 'dvh' with 'vh' on older browsers
  that treat dvh as invalid (prevents 0-height canvas)
- Fix touchAction: set 'auto' while loading to allow page scroll,
  'none' once sequence is ready for custom gesture handling
- Add 'sequence-grid-canvas' class for styling hooks

ComparisonOverlay.tsx - Request correlation:
- Add jobId to comparison requests for proper request/response matching
- Store activeJobIdRef to track current job
- Check jobId in worker response before applying results
- Prevents race conditions with concurrent/cancelled comparisons
- Collect results in single payload before setting state

ComplexityOverlay.tsx:
- UI polish and loading state improvements
- Better error handling for analysis results

RepeatsOverlay.tsx:
- Improved repeat pattern visualization
- Enhanced loading states

GpuWasmBenchmarkOverlay.tsx:
- Add comprehensive GPU and WASM performance benchmarking
- Show detailed metrics for compute capabilities
- Add SIMD detection and performance comparison

Overlay.tsx:
- Animation and transition refinements
- Improved close handling

ActionDrawer.tsx:
- Minor styling and behavior polish

CRTToggleButton.tsx:
- Interaction improvements

BlockedHotkeyToast.tsx:
- Minor copy/styling fix

Model3DView.tsx:
- Compatibility and performance improvements

useSequenceGrid.ts:
- Add displayLengthRef to track sequence length for getIndexAtPoint
- Fixes stale closure issue where sequence.length was captured
- Update ref via effect when displaySequence changes

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
